name: Peter v. NantKwest, Inc.
question: Does the phrase “[a]ll the expenses of the proceedings” in 35 U.S.C. § 145 include attorneys’ fees?
description: A case in which the Court held that the phrase “[a]ll the expenses of the proceedings” in 35 U.S.C. § 145 does not include attorneys’ fees incurred as a result of defending the agency in § 145 litigation.
